name: Pharma-Ease
title: Full-Stack AI-Powered Pharmacy Platform
desc: A cutting-edge pharmacy management system and e-commerce platform. It integrates Grok AI for smart medicine recommendations, Cloudinary for pharmaceutical image hosting, and Inngest for reliable background job processing.
how_built: Built using the MERN stack and Next.js for a robust full-stack architecture. I integrated the Grok AI API to provide intelligent health and medicine insights. Inngest handles complex background workflows like order processing and inventory notifications. Cloudinary manages the heavy lifting of product imagery, while GSAP provides smooth, premium animations throughout the user journey.

name: LMS
title: Advanced Learning Management System
desc: A comprehensive Learning Management System built with the Next.js App Router. It features real-time classrooms using Socket.io, an AI Tutor powered by Google Gemini API, and seamless media management with Cloudinary.
how_built: Developed using the Next.js App Router for a unified full-stack experience. I integrated Socket.io for real-time live classrooms and chat features. The AI Tutor is powered by Gemini API, providing students with instant help. Cloudinary handles all course assets and video uploads, while MongoDB stores user and course data.

name: Book Selling Website
title: Professional Book E-commerce Platform
desc: A powerful MERN stack platform for selling books online. It features a custom-built authentication system, seamless checkout with Stripe, and optimized state management with Redux Toolkit.
how_built: Developed using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) with a custom JWT-based authentication system. I integrated Stripe for secure transactions and Tailwind CSS for a sleek, responsive design. Redux Toolkit ensures efficient global state management for the cart and user data.

name: Web Testing Tool
title: Automated QA & BDD Testing Framework
desc: A comprehensive testing utility that leverages Puppeteer and Cucumber.js to perform automated browser tests. Features Gherkin-based test definitions and secure Clerk authentication.
how_built: Architected with the MERN stack and Next.js, this tool uses Puppeteer for deep browser automation and Cucumber.js/Gherkin for behavior-driven testing. Clerk handles user access, while Tailwind CSS provides a clean dashboard for viewing test results and reports.

name: E-Commerce Store
title: Modern Lifestyle & Multi-Product Store
desc: A sophisticated e-commerce hub built with the MERN stack, featuring a high-end UI powered by Shadcn and secure user management through Clerk. Integrates various external APIs for real-time product data and features.
how_built: Built on the MERN stack but enhanced with Shadcn UI components for a premium feel. Instead of custom auth, I implemented Clerk for robust security. I also integrated multiple external APIs to fetch dynamic product data and exchange rates, providing a richer user experience.

name: Social Media App
title: Interactive Social Networking Hub
desc: A full-scale social media application built with Next.js and MongoDB. It includes real-time messaging, stories, and a dedicated admin customer support dashboard with custom authentication.
how_built: Leveraged the power of Next.js and MongoDB to create a dynamic social platform. I implemented a secure custom authentication system. The app features advanced social interactions like real-time messaging and story sharing, managed via a custom admin panel for customer support.
